summary:
TERROR VISIONS AND NATIONAL COVERING: Brandon describes a vision of a New York Times headline reading 'Terror in Manhattan' and 'Terror strikes again in America,' accompanied by images of smoke and a building. He shares a visual of a protective, multicolored umbrella representing a prayer covering over America and individual homes. Brandon states that unbiblical decisions, such as those made by the mayor of New York, create holes in this umbrella, allowing enemy attacks. He emphasizes the importance of a righteous male leading the household to maintain this prayer covering and clarifies that temporary hardships are not God's judgment, defining true judgment as eternal separation in hell.

DRONE THREATS AND GLOBAL CONFLICTS: Brandon recounts seeing a new wave of terror activity utilizing Amazon drones strapped with explosives, a threat he claims the Trump administration is preparing to combat. He connects these drone threats to the conflict in Ukraine, black swan events, and a deadline for a peace deal by Thanksgiving. Brandon describes seeing businessmen in suits who want the war to continue, as well as Ukrainian President Zelensky and French President Macron. Additionally, he mentions a vision of ancient, torch-lit tunnels underneath Rome and the Vatican, which he associates with dark activities and human trafficking.

POLITICAL FIGURES AND EUROPEAN ATTACKS: Brandon discusses Donald Trump, stating he will be radically born again, baptized in the Holy Ghost, and speak in tongues. He then shares a vision regarding the Winter Olympics in Europe, where a demonic octopus attempted to obscure his view with an ink cloud. Upon looking higher, Brandon saw a French train station and a cafe, accompanied by warnings of terrorist attacks across Europe, specifically in France, Germany, and England. He also notes a vision of the King of England represented as a scorpion looking toward Canada.

DOMESTIC TARGETS AND TIMELINES: Brandon describes threats to shopping malls during the holiday season, characterizing potential victims as 'fish in a barrel' and citing underground chatter involving Santa Claus and elf hats. He details seeing a terrorist battle plan laid out on a table using 3D printed models and Legos of American landmarks, including the Washington Monument, the White House, and the Golden Gate Bridge. These plans targeted the Fourth of July during America's 250th anniversary. Brandon also highlights April 13, 2026, coinciding with Holocaust Remembrance Day, as a critical date to pray over, warning of Pearl Harbor and Red Dawn style surprise attacks.

HEALTH, DIET, AND SPIRITUAL CONSISTENCY: Brandon details receiving instructions to practice moderation and portion control, specifically replacing diet sodas and aspartame with water and adopting a 9.5 pH water filtration system. He mentions an impending season of plagues and viruses corresponding to Matthew 24. Brandon discusses the need for his generation to set new spiritual standards, moving beyond past figures like Oral Roberts and Kathryn Kuhlman. He shares a divine message that he is currently operating at less than 25 percent of his calling, requiring greater daily consistency, obedience, and careful evaluation of his inner circle.

MARRIAGE RESTORATION AND HEALING: Brandon shares insights regarding the high divorce rate in the church, particularly among parents of children with autism or special needs. He emphasizes the necessity of dating one's spouse, maintaining a fresh relationship, and refusing to become a divorce statistic. Brandon also addresses individuals struggling with infertility, stating that financial seed sowing and dietary changes will lead to restored wombs and healing. He describes a vision of a gray worm representing a generational curse over a person's head, which must be broken through renewing the mind with the Bible.

ANGELIC VISIONS AND MYSTERY BABYLON: Brandon recounts a detailed vision of an angel with opalescent armor, a flaming sword adorned with emeralds, and a horn with a magenta pennant. The angel delivers the message that faith works by love. Following a reading of Revelation 17 and 18 concerning Mystery Babylon, Brandon describes seeing a dragon's face emerge from the ocean rocks, breathing upon bubbling amber. He concludes by relaying a prophetic word about a great shaking and storm coming to the earth, specifically mentioning a shifting, sifting, and changing of faces within Eagle Mountain and the Word of Faith circles.
rawData: [November 26, 2025]-[Drones]-[https://youtu.be/Wg_zympTrLE]-[Good evening, everybody. Thank you for joining us again tonight. I have my sweetheart with me tonight. I told her we will go ahead and pray and seek the Lord to see what He has for us tonight concerning our nation. Today, when I was driving around and doing errands, I saw in the spirit a headline in the New York Times. The caption in bold letters said, 'Terror in Manhattan.' Thank you, son. 'Terror in Manhattan.' In the picture, I saw a lot of smoke and a building. I saw 'Terror in Manhattan' in bold on the front of this newspaper, and below it, 'Terror strikes again in America.' Then it had the article of what happened. As I was praying—I guess we're just going to jump right into this to save you time—I saw an umbrella with beautiful colors; it was a protection. But because of choices that were made, this umbrella had holes all in it. Decisions being made over the years caused the holes to get bigger and bigger. The more the umbrella was covering over America, the more people were holding it and were excited to have it because it blocked the storms and the plan of the enemy. This umbrella was a covering. As American citizens or people around the world, you have this prayer covering from the churches. But as you make decisions against God's word, against God's plan, and against what God originally wanted for us, you cause holes in your umbrella. We repent, and the covering is still there, but there were holes in it because of those decisions. I saw these holes that were seemingly really small at the beginning, like pinholes, but over the course of time, the holes got larger and larger until the umbrella was no longer there. The Lord showed me the prayer covering of a home and the importance of the male being the head of the household. The man brings a covering over it, and the wife provides a prayer covering, too. There is so much importance in a man leading his family. The Lord was showing me the importance of righteous men in the household rising up and being what God has called you to be: lead your family, take them to church, pray with your kids, and pray with your wife. Be a godly spouse. Speak good things over your children and your wife. Bless your children and your wife spiritually, physically, and financially. Whatever you can do, you be that head. I saw that as America goes, as the church goes, and as big decisions go, that covering—no matter how much we prayed and asked God to cover things—the more unbiblical decisions were made, like those made in New York by the mayor, the more it caused holes. I saw a terror attack, and the Lord said, 'Do you see the power of prayer, Brandon? What it does? It brings that covering. But because you make unrighteous decisions, you open the door for the enemy.' I said, 'Lord, I need scriptures.' He brought up Job and other scriptures that Diana wrote down. The devil said, 'You've put a hedge around Job and I'm not able to touch it,' but if you remove that hedge, what Job feared the most came on him. He opened the door through fear; fear tolerated, faith contaminated. As he was making sacrifices out of fear for his children and acting out of fear, he opened the door for it. Now, when we have a church covering and you keep praying over it, He showed me the thorns. Not Hosea, I believe it was in Ezekiel—whoever breaks a hedge, the serpent will bite him. Okay, that's Ecclesiastes 10:8: 'Whoever breaks a hedge, a serpent will bite him.' As you break the hedge and that umbrella of covering, it allows the enemy to come in and kill, steal, and destroy. We have authority, but if you keep making ungodly decisions, and He says, 'I want you to live righteously,' but you are sleeping around while claiming to be a praying Christian, you are opening the door. That covering gets holes in it because you are allowing sin in. That is what the Lord was showing me today: the covering of prayer over America as we keep making these bad decisions. That's what He keeps talking about in 1 Corinthians 5:5. It is not His will for any of us to perish. Ladies and gentlemen, you think because you go through a hard time for a season, that is God's judgment. True judgment is separation from God for eternity. It's not the day-to-day hard times. The way the Lord kept showing me was, 'That is not judgment, Brandon. True judgment is whenever you are going to hell forever and there is no returning. It's the point where there is no turning back; you are in hell forever.' The moment you take your last breath and you do not have Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior, if you are not a born-again Christian, that is true judgment. But having a shaking to awaken people—like what I have seen coming—they will all say, 'This is judgment. God's mad,' and they will call it an Ichabod. 'God has departed from America.' No, it is people making poor choices and voting unwisely. They keep thinking they can do these things without repercussions. I am trying to tell you what I keep seeing. When I saw the headlines in the paper, I said, 'Oh Lord.' He said, 'Brandon, do you see the importance of a choice? Do you see the importance of the prayer covering that you bring over your family?' That covers you; you have the authority to pray that your family is always in the right place at the right time. But I am talking about as a city as a whole. You keep making poor choices and voting in ways that allow the enemy to get a stronghold in an area. That is why I was praying over these things today. People might say, 'Brandon, you're being too harsh,' but I am just telling you what I am praying over today. It is a little raw, but this is what I am seeing in the headlines. I saw a great shaking coming again. I keep seeing these things, and quite frankly, it is very sobering. I even told her, "I could feel such a shifting last night," praying over President Trump and the things I saw. I'm going to go over some of that, but I was just trying to give you an update of what we saw today as I'm praying. I want to go over this. Remember yesterday, we saw a lot about drones last night and the night before. We kept seeing drones in the sky, and I saw a new wave of terror activity in America using drones from Amazon strapped with explosive devices. I thought that was interesting because I never see that; I always see them using vans, trucks, or semis, and the Lord keeps telling me to pray over this, but now I'm seeing drones more. As I've been seeing all these things about drones and praying over New Year's Eve and the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade, Braden stumbled upon this. I'll let you watch this. This is not a coincidence; this is how we're being led on this channel. I think it's very interesting what's being said. Do you have it ready? This is Fox News. It's not a coincidence what we've been hearing because they're talking about it, and the Trump administration is already preparing for it—$500 million and doing all the things they can to combat what they believe are credible threats. We're getting this by the spirit of God. This news article comes out two days later after we prayed about it. I thought, "Are they listening to our webcast? Are these news reporters watching us?" I don't believe they are, but they could be. Wouldn't it be neat if Fox News was watching? Maybe they'll get saved if they're not. I think it's interesting that we are praying over these things and it's coming up in the news. This is exactly the assignment the Lord told us about, even concerning New Year's Eve. When I saw the drone coming in, the Lord said this is related to Ukraine and black swan events—major events to shake New York as we see the deadline of the Trump administration saying we want a deal done on Ukraine concerning the Russia war. He was saying they want that done by Thanksgiving. As we see this, I've seen an escalation because Zelensky was looking at Macron and was like, "What do I do?" He didn't know what to do, and they were trying to come up—and this is what I saw in the spirit. They wanted the war to keep going because of the suits; I saw these businessmen in suits who were funding it and wanted the war to keep going. The other part was the tunnels underneath Rome. I saw old flaming torches lighting the tunnels in Rome underneath the Vatican. I saw there were tunnels and they were very old. These tunnels looked like they could have been hundreds of years old, winding deep underground. They were a representation of something the Lord said was dark. I saw these—like I said, it was not electric. It was torches lit on fire like old caves, with a wrap around them in a holder in a tunnel. I try not to talk about this because it's controversial, but I saw what I saw and the Lord was telling me. It was right after we prayed about sex trafficking that I saw tunnels, and I thought, "That's dark." Braden showed this to me today about President Trump. President Trump says America is finding its way back to church and to God. He says more people are praying, churches are coming back, and religion is coming back to America. To me, that's a big deal. I was excited, thinking that's exactly what we want for a god-fearing administration. We need a president who brings prayer back. People are praying more than ever before. I know what the Lord showed me: that he would be radically born again, baptized in the Holy Ghost and fire, and speaking in tongues. There would be a major move of God on his heart. He's more Christian, in terms of standing for biblical basis things, than any administration has been since I was a kid—maybe Ronald Reagan. I'm excited to see him walking with his wife. I'm praying over their marriage, their children, and these things. Let's go to what we saw last night. I saw him going to the Winter Olympics, and I saw an octopus. This demonic octopus came up before me in Europe, and it was trying to cause a smoke screen so that I couldn't see the plans and plots concerning his life. The octopus spoke to me and said, "I'm not moving," but I said, "You are moving. You've got to move out of the way, and you don't have a choice." As I started to attack that and tell it to move, it let out ink—a black cloud that flooded my viewing area. I got quiet, wondering what to do as I'd never come across this before. The Lord said, "Brandon, go up higher. You've got to go over it. Come up higher like an eagle and see over it." I started praying in the spirit, and he said, "I'm not going to show all of it because it would bring danger to you." So he said, I'll show you in part. So I saw, I go up higher, and then I saw France again and I saw a train station. Then I saw pastries, a coffee shop, and baguettes, and croissants. And I saw tables outside where it was like a restaurant, they could sit outside and enjoy their meal. The Lord was showing me terrorist attacks concerning France. He said, This does not only have to do with America, but this is concerning Europe. So, that is what we were praying into last night. I saw about Europe and I saw Germany, France, and England. That is when I saw the scorpion again and I saw the king of England like the scorpion coming out and looking at Canada and these places. I thought that was interesting because people talked about the scorpion and what it represents and the horoscopes and all that stuff, which I do not look at any of that trash. But I think it is interesting because of the demonic ties to what the Lord is trying to say to me because of Scorpio or whatever they were trying to say. But the Lord is not using horoscopes. God is not doing that. I am trying to tell you all that the devil latches onto that demonic stuff because that is him. He is the author of confusion, demonic, evil stuff. So, I thought that was interesting. What were you going to say? I was trying to help you. You saw the escalator in the center. You saw malls. Praying over malls. I saw the center of malls and I heard like fish in a barrel. They were like fish in a barrel because they were looking and there was nowhere for them to run. It takes them too long to get away and they had a plan using mass shootings and things like that in malls during the holiday season, not just in America. This was concerning Rome, Italy, all over the place. And the Lord said, Pray over this. I heard them talking; they are like fish in a barrel. Then I saw something to do with the key word in the underground chats about stocking hats. Holiday hats, Christmas hats, Christmas elves, and it was something about the Santa Claus hats. I thought that was interesting because I saw underground chatter again. We prayed over all that last night. I felt like we had a lot, like I told you all, I feel like we are icebreakers every single time. I feel like we just plow right through. And I believe every time we come together and we pray like this, we are just plowing through that spiritual, demonic ice, and we are taking things down. But like I said, when it comes to New York in some of these areas, I pray for the people to have wisdom where they are. I am trying to tell you all that there are holes in their umbrella. That is what I keep saying. This prayer covering, there are holes in the umbrella of New York. And that is what the Lord said, Brandon, do you see that? I said, Yes, I do. I see it, Lord. I am asking for grace and mercy. I am asking, Father, that the people that are there, there would be a covering over them because I heard terror in Manhattan. It was in the New York Times: Terror strikes again in America. And I thought, Oh, this is heavy. As it is with us, we just keep praying over things, but I try to keep you up to date. You saw a battle plan. I saw a battle plan. It was on a table. It looked like a table, but these people in the terrorist organizations were strategizing. I saw the Washington Monument. I saw these areas and they had them on a map. But it was interesting that they were all like real-life plastic toys. It was a model of the White House and they had it all set up looking at each individual thing of where it was on this table almost like Legos. A 3D model. Yes. But then they had one and it was over San Francisco and the Golden Gate Bridge was a part of it. I could see the bridge but it looked like little plastic models, maybe 3D printouts, Legos, or whatever it was, but they had it on a table and they were strategizing concerning the Fourth of July. I went to the 4th of July, and it was over the 250th anniversary, and the Lord allowed me to look into this and he said, Pray into the plans concerning it. It is not the day. This is a Pearl Harbor experience to catch you by surprise. He said, Similar to October 7th to catch you by surprise. He kept saying to expect the unexpected concerning major events in the spirit realm, plots, and so they had this table and they had every single one of something that was important to us as Americans as a model. But the Lord was circling 250 years of American history in April. Pray over April 13th. It was highlighted before me and he talked about Easter. Orthodox Easter is the 14th, I believe, or the 13th, the day after. But he highlighted the Jewish Holocaust. Holocaust Remembrance Day is on Monday, April 13th, 2026. I was seeing that day highlighted and it was circled. He said, Pray over that day. I saw that and I thought, Well, that is a very sad day. It is Holocaust Remembrance Day. Why April 13th? After I went from April, it went clear to July, and he said, Pray over these time frames. Black swan events, major, and he kept talking about Pearl Harbor event, the Red Dawn experience, the enemy within. That table was really planned out. It is like taking graphics and everything, but it was like Lego things so they had a visual, and he was taking a teaching stick and he was pointing to each one, and they were talking about how they could do things and strategizing. I thought that was kind of interesting. Some of the things I see are metaphors. They are symbolic, like Lily, that young girl Diana. You said she lives in Australia. It was not about a real Lily. It was a fragrance, but it was about her name. I truly believe after we have prayed over that, that is who we are praying for that God would give a supernatural song to. It is the way the Lord shows with visions and dreams. A lot of times it is symbolic, but sometimes it is just black and white. Diana has a lot of cool dreams and prophetic things, and a lot of times it is symbolic. Good morning, America. I believe it has to do with the sun coming up and the show concerning the Olympics. Yes, it was concerning the Olympic Village. There's something about praying over the Olympics with Good Morning America, and that was the same thing with praying over President Trump if he ends up going to the Olympics. I don't think that would be smart; I think he should stay home, but we'll just keep him in the prayer covering. He's never done anything out of fear; he has always been bold as a lion and represented well, even when it comes to going to football games; he just shows up. So, as I was praying over the Winter Olympics, our president, and the Olympic Village where the athletes stay, I saw massive events during this timeframe. There is a lot there. All these different prayer assignments could take days. But that's why the Lord is assembling so many of us together—you may be prompted in your spirit to pray over something that someone else might not be. Praying over the parade, Friday's tree lighting ceremonies, and the Washington D.C. lighting ceremonies—it’s interesting because every one of us puts our piece together. It's not all on just one person. I get excited because the Lord shows so much, and I ask, 'Which one do I attack first?' The Olympic Village. But praying over each thing and knowing this is not going to overwhelm me, I keep going. It can get you tired, though. After pushing the last couple of days, it's been very heavy. I told Diana that I vowed to do these videos and pray over our nation. Praying over Kai, Trump's granddaughter. You said He has great things in store for the wealth transfer and great blessings on His people. That's why I was talking about the blessing and the increase on our churches for the multiplication of our seeds. Was it this video, son, about when He mentioned retribution? That was one time before, regarding the Trail of Tears. Those are basically the highlights. That's 34 minutes of it. Is that good? Do you have any questions? I try not to bombard you, but I think I hit everything pretty well. I try to be thorough and not boring. The Lord is teaching me portion control. I told her tonight that everything is about moderation. He talks to me about how everyone has stuff they are working on. Everything in moderation. Gluttony is about how much you eat until you're full. He takes the little things and talks to you about them if you listen. Regarding moderation, I had a big Frito pie because it's cold, but I just took a little bit and ate the greens. He said, 'You can have just a little of that. I'm not asking you to have nothing, but I'm asking you to learn portion control.' I said, 'Portion control? That's not a word I've ever used before.' I used to eat mine and Diana's too, but now it's portion control. The Holy Spirit will lead you into all truth. The Lord has been putting health on my heart concerning 2026. There is this water filter system—I don't remember the name, but it's pricey and provides 9.5 pH water. That keeps the cancer word out of your body. It's a purification system that works off your tap and filters water indefinitely. I thought it was neat studying how to be your healthiest self for 2026, focusing on the longevity of your cells. He's been talking to me about my health, Diana's health, and my kids' health. How do we do this better for the body of Christ for what's coming? The Lord told me concerning this virus that we'll have plagues and pestilence. This is Matthew 24, and we're not going to stop those things because the Bible says we would see them. Does that mean it affects you? No. I don't believe we're under the curse of the law, but we'll see what Jesus said we would see: wars and rumors of wars. We aren't going to go against what the Bible said would happen, especially what Jesus said. He said we would see these things, but it is not the end; it's the beginning of sorrows. So I'm going to line up with the Word. I'm not attacking anyone, but if a prophetic word goes against the Word of God, you run away from it. Period. Do we have authority over viruses? Yes, I believe it wholeheartedly. We are in the end of the end. Either way, I don't try to contradict the Word. I want scripture to back up what I'm seeing, like the canopies. I don't want to be part of prophetic static and clutter because we are leading so many people. You want with prayer and these things. I told the Lord, 'What's the standard?' We have a standard in what we've seen in the past, but those people are going home. What's the new standard of the Jack Coe, the Oral Roberts, the William Branhams, and the A. A. Allens? We saw that as the standard before, but He said, 'I'm doing something new.' I said, 'What's the new standard? What's the new goal?' We are the trendsetters. The world's been the trendsetters for long enough. I thought, 'What does it mean?' When we look to those people because they're in the past to go, 'Hey, do you remember what they did in their ministry?'—Kathryn Kuhlman and the greats, what we call the greats: the Kenneth Hagins and the R. W. Schambachs. You go, 'Man, they were something.' But that was their generation. What about ours? Where is it that the people look not at us? They're looking at Jesus in us, but you become the trendsetter. You're the one that sets the mark. Where's the bar? Who's the Michael Jordan of this generation? Well, it's LeBron James. No, I don't believe that. Come on now. Do you see where you are with prayer? Where are the Rachel Teafatillers and the people that prayed in the past, where you come up and you're the next generation and people say, 'Hey, they're the leaders'? You're the ones taking the baton. That's why I want to encourage you all: be the trendsetters of this generation spiritually. Be the ones that are up there. Not that people put you on a pedestal and ego sets in, but they have something to mirror themselves to say, 'Hey, listen. I see Jesus in them. I see Jesus in them.' Not going always back to the past. God's doing something new in this day and age. They had their time, but God said, 'I'm bringing in my closers. I saved the best for last.' I thought, 'You saved the best for last? Where are the generals?' Kim Clement went home. John Paul Jackson went home. A lot of these generals that we look to as young people are not here anymore and we're all looking at Jesus and striving to be like Him. But there's the people like John G. Lake that you're looking at. I told D, 'Where's the next generation? We're the next generation. Either you've got it or you don't.' I sat there in the shower looking up and talking, 'Father,' and I stirred myself a bit. I said, 'Where do you get it?' He said, 'Brendan, you're only operating in less than 25% of what I've called you to do.' I said, 'Oh, I'm already getting old. It's taking all this time. Lord, I'm only operating in less than 25% of what You've asked me to do.' I said, 'Lord, I'm so sorry. How do I get there? I feel like I've pushed as hard as I could to get where I'm at. I feel like I'm so far away.' When You say that to me, I said, 'How? How?' He said, 'Consistency. Every day you put your clothes on, every day you take a bath, every day you eat your meal. But every day you feed yourself spiritually. It's the inconsistency. It's going from glory to glory, son. It's being consistent with what I've asked you to do and obedience in what I've told you to do and following through. Follow through with what I've told you to do.' We're all thinking that it's the big things—the big major thing that's going to get you there. But it's the small decisions. It's the small foxes that spoil the vine. It's not the major grand decision, like moving across America. It's the small decisions like He's talking about my weight—these little things: your health, what you're meditating on, what you're listening to, who you're hanging around, who's in your inner circle. Who's in your inner circle that should not be there? Who's influencing you in your circle—out of your friends, maybe family? He'll cut. 'I don't want you talking to them much. I don't want you hanging around them much.' That may hurt people's feelings. But for your peace—if it costs you your peace, it's too expensive. If this is derailing you or your marriage, it's too expensive. Make sure that—what was it we said?—if they don't celebrate your presence, let them get accustomed to your absence. If they don't celebrate your presence, let them get accustomed to your absence. That's concerning churches; that's concerning whoever. If they don't celebrate your presence, let them become accustomed to your absence. That's what I'm trying to tell y'all: you've got to look at who's in your inner circle in 2026 that shouldn't be there. Who's influencing your wife? Who's influencing your husband? Who's influencing your kids? I want so bad to sit at His feet even more in 2026. I've seen some cool stuff in 2025, but I'm not satisfied here. I do not want to be where I'm at right now. After he said, 'You're only operating at 25%,' I went, 'Oh, no. Lord, help me. What am I missing? What am I doing wrong? Search me and know me, Lord. What am I doing wrong? How is that even possible at the age that I'm at right now? That means even if I double it, that's only 50%. If I double it even in my lifetime, I won't even hardly fulfill what You called me to do.' I was like, 'Lord, how do I get there? How do I go from glory to glory faster?' Obedience. Spending time with Me. But don't look at the major decisions as the big grand ones. It's the small decisions. Eat a smoothie today, but that hot dog looks really good. That's what He was talking to me about today. I went and got the smoothie. You see, this is where I'm talking about going from glory to glory. I'm trying to keep you alive, son. If you listen to Me, you'll have long life. Most people get upset if they die and go home early. He said, 'I told you the willing and obedient will eat the good of the land. I told you to follow My voice and listen to the instructions that I have for you. Drink the right things. Don't drink diet soda all the time. Diet soda was my thing. I love Coke Zero and I used to chug down Coke Zero all the time.' He said, 'You're done with that.' I said, 'Well, yeah, it gave me a headache anyway.' But I sure like that, and it doesn't have high fructose corn syrup. He said, 'Cut soda out. You're done.' aspartame—it's bad. It's bad. And she said, 'You're done. You're done. Don't drink any more diet sodas.' That's what He said to me. Stop it. And so I did it. I've been obedient. I haven't touched them this year. I'm telling you, it was hard because a Sonic Route 44 Coke Zero with a little splash of vanilla in that was my jam. I loved it. I told her, 'I've got to have my Coke.' But I stopped it. It wasn't easy. But it's the small decision. That was probably huge because some of y'all are going, 'Oh my God.' But it was a deal for me, and I stopped it. I'm just trying to say: what is it about your 2026? What are the things you can tweak to come up higher in your relationship with the Father? Have a better marriage. How have a better love life? You know, you date your wife again, date your husband again. Don't let things—well, we've been together for 30 years, 40 years, 50 years—it's just kind of getting old. Been with her forever. I know everything about her. Find something new. Keep your marriage spicy. Don't allow it to become stagnant. It's your choice. And I told her, I said, "We've got to date each other like we were when we were kids. Pretend like you don't have me. It's the truth. Pretend you don't have me. I pretend I don't have you." That we're pursuing each other. But make sure that you keep your marriage fresh. Bring back that spark. You've got to keep your flame fanned. Keeping things fresh. Don't become accustomed to your wife. Don't become accustomed to your husband and take them for granted. There's so many people that are messing around on their wife or their husbands and they're having adultery situations in the body of Christ. How many marriages? They said 75% or more of all marriages end in divorce in the body of Christ—or more was the statistics—especially with kids with special needs in the body of Christ. We've got to come up higher. We've got to be the trendsetters. I refuse to be a statistic. And I saw, you know, what did their mama overcome? They have diabetes. They have heart disease. They have all these things going on.
